topic.title: Spring 2026 Guest Speaker Series - Complete Schedule
topic.text:
Hello,

Our guest speaker lineup for Spring 2026 is confirmed. We have eleven industry leaders scheduled to share their expertise throughout the semester.

SPEAKER SCHEDULE:

January 17th
Enrique Sallent - UX Accessibility Principal, Fidelity Investments

January 24th
Nik Bear Brown - Northeastern Professor and Artist

January 31st
Shesh Gupta - Senior Manager Data Science, Machine Learning, Capital One

February 7th
Venkat Patla - Chief Marketing Officer, RWA Partners

February 14th
Adam Pender - Chief Propulsion Engineer, Lockheed Martin

February 21st
Peter Emery - Fractional CMO, Marketing Consultant, Peter Emery Consulting

March 14th
Dr. Maricla Piorzzi - Program Director, Northeastern College of Engineering

March 21st
Carl Ludewig - Sr. Director, Marketing Technology, eBay
Mukund Thiyagarajan - eBay

March 28th
Scott Redick - Director, Brand Activation, Charles Schwab

April 4th
Khushboo Gajwani - Head of Social, Gallo Legal

April 11th
Sam Ward & John Alderman - Co-Founders, Alderman & Ward

CLASS INFORMATION:

Time: Every Saturday, 12:00 PM ET
Dates: January 17 - April 11, 2026

Join Zoom Meeting:
https://northeastern.zoom.us/j/92710545738?pwd=DoIn2w725fjrJWuXpDaKQTY1ndMEMl.1

Meeting ID: 927 1054 5738
Passcode: 881831

Add to Calendar:
https://northeastern.zoom.us/meeting/tJYqdumtqj4tGdy5t0GDggaNJ8xg33hBaztv/ics?icsToken=DAC-cQdW9Y5uCGX7qQAALAAAACzTeXwviJpg7nBuErvE497Kfc9-W_3A3s24YhhufL0B4m15hPHYw5qz7CryYlKOmJTqlcWzNhMbI9NvjzAwMDAwMQ__

These sessions provide direct access to professionals working in brand strategy, marketing technology, data science, and engineering. Each week I will send out background information on the speakers so you can prepare your questions for the guest speaker mini assignments. Attendance and participation are expected.

Prof. Nik & Nina
